title: Mebahel's Antique Beasts
description: Inspired by Skyrim and Age of Mythology — battle ancient warriors, tame legendary beasts, and explore forgotten ruins from across civilizations. Myth, magic, and chaos await in this immersive fantasy overhaul.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315"
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/uiBtHUpy6KU"

</iframe>

# 🐉 Antique Beasts

Venture into the world of **mythologies and folklore**, encounter and slay a multitude of vicious beasts, tame fantastical creatures and become a legend of your own story.

Antique Beasts introduces a wide range of **mobs**, **weapons**, **armour**, **mechanics**, **structures** and **animations**, designed to make Minecraft feel **more alive, immersive and challenging**.

Some mobs and structures are inspired by **Skyrim** and **Age of Mythology**.

***

> ⚠️ **REQUIRED MODS**

### 🔨 Forge users:

You **must install**:

* [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)  
* [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api)
* [Azurelib Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib-armor)
* [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

### 🧵 Fabric users:

You **must install**:

* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [Azurelib Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib-armor)
* [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

***

## 🧩 Key Features

*   🛡️ **Configurable patrols**: spawn every 1–60 minutes, move toward a random location, and group-attack the player if approached (can be disabled).
*   ⚔️ **Raid system**: kill 20 Draugrs while holding a crafted _Thuriasz Rune_ to trigger a 3-wave invasion. If successful, earn a valuable treasure chest.
*   🔥 **Nether-aware scaling**: raids become harder if the player has visited the Nether.
*   🧠 **AI upgrades**, combat synergy, and immersive behaviour for mythological creatures.
*   ✅ **Fully compatible with Better Combat.**

***

## 🛠️ Configuration Options

### 📁 `antiquebeasts_config.json`

*   `"patrolSpawning": true` → toggle patrols
*   `"patrolSpawnDelay": 20` → interval in minutes (1–60)

### 📁 `antiquebeasts_spawn_rate_config.json`

*   Control each mob’s natural spawn rate individually (0–10)

### 📁 `antiquebeasts_bonus_health_config.json`

*   Add up to +50 hearts per unit (0–100 = +0 to +50 HP)

### 📁 `antiquebeasts_armor_value_config.json`

*   Set individual values for \[boots, leggings, chestplate, helmet\]

***

## 🧟‍♂️ Mobs

### Greeks

*   Elite Hoplite
*   Champion Hoplite
*   Hero Hoplite
*   Hades Chosen
*   Hades Shade
*   Chimera
*   Cyclops
*   Frost Cyclops
*   Pegasus

### Norse

*   Throwing Axeman
*   Hersir
*   Huskarl
*   Einherjar
*   Valkyrie

### Egyptians

*   Axeman
*   Camelry
*   Elephant Rider
*   Wadjet
*   Mummy
*   Servant
*   Egyptian Caravan

### Draugrs

*   Draugr
*   Draugr Scourge
*   Draugr Wight
*   Draugr Archer
*   Skeleton Warrior

### Dwemer Automatons

(_Take more damage from blunt weapons, less from sharp ones_)

*   Dwemer Centurion
*   Dwemer Spider
*   Dwemer Spider Guardian

### Others

*   Harpy

### Bosses

*   Mummified Pharaon
*   Draugr Overlord

***

## 🏰 Structures

### 🌍 Overworld

*   Drakkar _(cold water boat)_
*   Trireme _(warm water boat)_
*   Greek Temple _(massive dungeon with loot)_
*   Hoplite Barrack _(contains a map to Greek Temple)_
*   Outdoor Cyclops Cave _(contains a map to Hoplite Barrack)_
*   Norse Military Camp
*   Norse Farmer Camp _(easier)_
*   Ruined Temple _(guarded by Chimera)_
*   Egyptian Pyramid _(boss dungeon with Mummy & secrets)_
*   Draugr Crypt _(large underground dungeon with Draugr Overlord)_
*   Dwemer Tower _(leads to Dwemer Ruin)_
*   Dwemer Ruin _(Blackreach / Raldbthar / basic layouts)_

### 🔥 Nether

*   Hades Shrine

***

## 💬 Notes & Credits

*   🧪 This mod is **a work in progress** — feedback and ideas are welcome!
*   💬 Join our Discord: [https://discord.com/invite/y8uC2NepkB](https://discord.com/invite/y8uC2NepkB)
*   🧰 Includes **LibGui** for versions **< 1.2.13**
*   🙏 Special thanks to `@akari` for help with models and textures.
*   🏛️ Some Dwemer structures are based on builds by [fonta59 (Skyrim in Minecraft)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/skyrim-map-by-fonta59-skyrim-tes-interiors-with-download-1-20/), with permission.
